Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user has provided a detailed description of a loan application process with normative strict rules and desiderata recommended practices There is an event log for three cases

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1 is fully compliant with both normative rules and desiderata The sequence is perfect Application Credit Check Risk Assessment Approved Decision Inform Finalize Close and all timing constraints are met Credit Check 24 h Inform 48 h

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The absence of a follow up call is only a minor desideratum deviation not a violation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 2 has multiple normative violations Risk Assessment occurred before Credit Check breaking the required order Finalize Documentation was performed after a rejection which is explicitly forbidden
